data.title: Chatham Lodging Trust reveals 2025 distribution information in West Palm Beach, Fla.
data.description: Chatham Lodging Trust, based in West Palm Beach, Florida, recently disclosed the characterization of its distributions for 2025. The company announced this through a press release, specifying how dividends paid out to shareholders will be classified for tax purposes. This information is significant for investors and stakeholders as they plan their financial strategies.

data.title: Jeff York rejoins Paycom as Chief Sales Officer (CSO) effective January 23, 2026, replacing Amy Walker. He served as CSO from 2007 to 2021. Walker transitions to consulting role for the company.
data.description: In Oklahoma City, Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE: PAYC) revealed that Jeff York will reassume his role as chief sales officer (CSO) on January 23, 2026. York, who has been Paycom's Leadership Strategist, previously held the CSO position from 2007 to 2021. He is taking over from Amy Walker, who is moving from her CSO position to a consulting role within the company. This transition marks York's return to a key role within Paycom, a prominent provider of cloud-based human capital management software.

data.title: Zoomcar announces exchange offer for existing warrants for common stock and $5.0 million bridge financing placement.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Bengaluru-based Zoomcar Holdings, Inc. revealed its initiative to launch a voluntary exchange offer for multiple series of existing warrants. Trading on the OTCQB under the symbol ZCAR, the company is a prominent peer-to-peer self-drive car-sharing platform in India. The offer aims to swap the existing warrants for shares of the company's common stock, valued at $0.0001 per share. This move signifies the company's efforts to potentially enhance its capital structure and streamline its financial operations.

data.title: Dow slips despite Nvidia surge while Nasdaq shines. Small caps drop post Thursday high.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline despite Nvidia's increase. Small caps also saw a sell-off after reaching a peak on Thursday. The stock market today demonstrated a mixed performance with the Dow falling, while the Nasdaq stood out as the day's highlight. This information was covered live by Investor's Business Daily. Overall, the market exhibited fluctuations, with specific numbers and detailed analysis available in the coverage.

data.title: ArrowMark Financial Corp. will distribute $0.15 per share in February 2026 to shareholders of record on Feb 3.
data.description: ArrowMark Financial Corp. (Nasdaq: BANX) declared a monthly cash distribution of $0.15 per share for February 2026. The total distribution of $0.15 per share will be paid on February 27, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 3, 2026. ArrowMark Financial is an SEC registered closed-end management investment company based in Denver.

data.title: Crypto today: Stay updated on daily trends impacting Bitcoin price & blockchain. Stay informed on DeFi, NFTs, Web3 & crypto regulation.

data.title: Privo Technologies reports success in PRV211 arm of CLN-004 trial: Primary Endpoint Met, No Adverse Events. (Words: 88)
data.description: Privo Technologies has reached a significant milestone in the PRV211 arm of the CLN-004 clinical trial, as announced on 23-Jan-2026. The primary endpoint has been successfully met, with no reports of serious adverse events. This update comes after modifications were implemented by the company.

data.title: Czechoslovak Group exercises Over-Allotment Option in IPO on Euronext Amsterdam, not for US/APAC/Can/Japan.

data.title: Immunovant (Nasdaq: IMVT) to release Q3 results on Feb 6, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET for quarter ended Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Immunovant (Nasdaq: IMVT) revealed that they are scheduled to release their financial results for the third quarter ending December 31, 2025, along with a business update. This disclosure is set for 8:00 a.m. ET on Friday, February 6, 2026. The company operates in Durham, N.C. and New York.

data.title: David Figueredo appointed as Chief Innovation Officer at MedeAnalytics company in Richardson, Texas.
data.description: In Richardson, Texas, a recent addition has been made to MedeAnalytics, an enterprise focused on healthcare performance improvement. David Figueredo has been appointed as the Chief Innovation Officer for the company.

The report also suggests that inflation rates are anticipated to reach around 2.5%, signaling a moderate increase. Additionally, experts predict that unemployment rates may decrease by 1.5% compared to the previous year. These projections provide a positive outlook for various sectors and economies worldwide.

data.title: Nexalin Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: NXL) gets Nasdaq notice for non-compliance with minimum bid price requirement.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Nexalin Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: NXL), a forefront player in non-invasive Deep Intracranial Frequency Stimulation (DIFS™) of the brain, disclosed that it was informed via a Notification Letter from Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on January 21, 2026. The Notification Letter highlighted the Company's non-compliance with the minimum bid price stipulation under NASDAQ Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) for continued listing on the exchange. As per NASDAQ Listing Rule 5810(b), necessitating prompt disclosure upon receipt of a deficiency notification, this press release was disseminated.
BLACKROCK PRIVATE DEBT FUND EXPECTS 19% NET ASSET VALUE CUT

data.title: NuVista Shareholders approved merger with Ovintiv with 99% vote, Meeting to proceed. Full details on SEDAR+ website.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on January 23, 2026, NuVista Energy Ltd. (TSX: NVA) and Ovintiv Inc. (NYSE, TSX: OVV) announced that at NuVista's special meeting, NuVista Shareholders voted overwhelmingly in favor of the plan of arrangement involving NuVista, Ovintiv Canada ULC, and Ovintiv Inc. The special resolution approving the Transaction was supported by approximately 99% of the votes cast by NuVista Shareholders in attendance or by proxy. Detailed voting results can be found in NuVista's Report of Voting Results under National Instrument 51-102, accessible on NuVista's SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca.

data.title: 2025 Q4 results of Acadian Timber Corp will be released on Feb 11, 2026 (after market close) with a conference call on Feb 12 at 1:00pm ET for investors and analysts. Website: www.acadiantimber.com/financial-information/
data.description: Acadian Timber Corp, based in Edmundston, New Brunswick, announced that it will unveil its fourth quarter results for 2025 on February 11, 2026, post-market closure. The detailed information can be accessed on the company's official website at www.acadiantimber.com/financial-information/. A subsequent conference call and webcast will take place on February 12, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. EST, during which senior management will delve into the financial and operational outcomes.

data.title: Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) provides 2025 dividend income tax treatment details in report, containing distribution per share and types of dividends.
data.description: In Chicago, Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) announced the tax status of its 2025 dividends for shareholders. The allocations on Form 1099-DIV are detailed below:- Record Date: [Specific Date]- Payable Date: [Specific Date]- Total Distribution Per Share: [Amount]- Ordinary Dividends: [Amount]- Qualified Dividends: [Amount]- Total Capital Gain Distribution: [Amount]- Unrecaptured Section 1250 Gain: [Amount]- Section 897 Ordinary Dividends: [Amount] - Section 897 Capital Gain: [Amount]- Nondividend Distribution: [Amount] The breakdown of the tax status for the dividends is specified in the provided tables. The company ensures transparency by disclosing these figures to shareholders and the regulatory authorities.

data.title: Independence Realty Trust discloses tax treatment for 2025 dividends on common stock. Breakdown includes Ordinary Dividend, Capital Gain Distribution, Section 897 Capital Gain, Return of Capital, and Section 199A. Record Date: 3/28/25. Payment Date: 4/21/25. Total breakdowns are found in given table.
data.description: Philadelphia-based Independence Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: IRT) has disclosed the tax details of the 2025 dividend payouts on its common stock. The income allocations for reporting on Form 1099-DIV include: Common Shares (CUSIP #45378A106) with a record date of 3/28/25 and payment date of 4/21/25. The dividend distribution per share comprises Ordinary Dividend, Total Capital Gain Distribution, Unrecaptured Sec. 1250 Gain, Section 897 Capital Gain, Return of Capital, and Section 199A. These allocations are vital for shareholders to accurately report their taxable income from these dividends.

data.title: Power & Infrastructure Split Corp. raises Class A share distribution from $0.085 to $0.10, a 17.6% increase to $1.20 per annum.
data.description: Power & Infrastructure Split Corp. class A shares (TSX: PWI) have seen significant growth, with a one-year return of 23.5% and a 13.8% per annum return since inception in May 2021. Due to this success and a positive sector outlook, Brompton Funds announces a rise in the monthly distribution rate from $0.085 to $0.10 per Class A Share. This new rate of $1.20 annually, reflecting a 10.8% return based on the TSX closing price of $11.10 on January 22, 2026, marks a 17.6% increase from the prior $1.02 annual rate.

data.title: Doctor Julian Douwes, who has treated over 20,000 Lyme patients, returns to Summit for insights on healthier living.
data.description: In Sugarcreek, Ohio, the 5th Seed to Spoon Summit is underway, with renowned Dr. Julian Douwes headlining the event. Dr. Douwes, known for aiding more than 20,000 Lyme disease patients, is sharing innovative strategies for better health. The summit commenced on January 23, 2026, offering groundbreaking insights and solutions to attendees.

data.title: Le Petit Chef, the world's smallest chef, comes to Cleveland's The Metropolitan at the 9 Hotel after global success.
data.description: The renowned dinner show Le Petit Chef, which has achieved global success, will now be showcased in Cleveland at The Metropolitan at the 9, Autograph Collection Hotel. This announcement was made on January 23, 2026, in Cleveland. Le Petit Chef is known for its innovative dinner theatre experience that has captivated audiences worldwide.
